title: rubus tenuiflorus
intro: Rubus tenuiflorus, also known as Himalayan raspberry or thimbleberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is native to the Himalayas and is traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating gastrointestinal issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Rubus tenuiflorus can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
